brokers.name: Spokeo
brokers.notes: Search your name, copy the listing URL, then submit it on the opt-out page. Confirmation email arrives within minutes.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: Whitepages
brokers.notes: Requires a phone call with an automated verification code to complete the suppression.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: BeenVerified
brokers.notes: Find your record, click it, then verify via the email link they send.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: Radaris
brokers.notes: Requires creating/verifying control of the listing. Often relists; re-check quarterly.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: MyLife
brokers.notes: Email privacy@mylife.com or call support to demand removal under CCPA.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: PeopleFinders
brokers.notes: Locate the listing and submit the URL. No account required.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: Intelius
brokers.notes: Part of the PeopleConnect network (Instant Checkmate, TruthFinder). Opt out via the unified PeopleConnect suppression portal. (Own /opt-out/submit/ URL 404'd; updated via vanish verify.)
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: TruePeopleSearch
brokers.notes: Fast removal. Paste the record URL and pass a captcha; no email needed.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: FastPeopleSearch
brokers.notes: Sister site to TruePeopleSearch. Same record-URL removal flow.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: Instant Checkmate
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect network. Email verification required.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: TruthFinder
brokers.notes: PeopleConnect network. Suppresses the public listing within 48 hours.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: Acxiom
brokers.notes: Large marketing data aggregator. Opt out of data sharing for marketing/cookies.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1); CA CPPA registered data broker

brokers.name: LexisNexis
brokers.notes: Permissible-purpose data. Opt-out is restricted; identity verification by mail may be required.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1); CA CPPA registered data broker

brokers.name: Oracle BlueKai
brokers.notes: Ad-tech data cloud (being wound down). Opt out via the registry/cookie controls; clear ad cookies.
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1)

brokers.name: Epsilon
brokers.notes: Marketing data cooperative. Email privacy@epsilon.com or use the consumer form linked from the privacy policy. (Old opt-out URL 404'd; updated via vanish verify.)
brokers.source: initial curated set (v0.1); CA CPPA registered data broker

brokers.name: CoreLogic (Cotality)
brokers.notes: Property and consumer-data aggregator feeding tenant/credit screening. CoreLogic rebranded to Cotality in 2025; opt-out via the privacy page. (Old URL 404'd; updated via vanish verify.)
brokers.source: California CPPA registered data broker (DELETE Act); opt-out URL from public lists

brokers.name: LiveRamp
brokers.notes: Identity-resolution graph (formerly Acxiom AbiliTec) feeding ad-tech matching.
brokers.source: California CPPA registered data broker (DELETE Act); opt-out URL from public lists

brokers.name: Equifax
brokers.notes: Credit bureau and consumer-data aggregator. Marketing opt-out also via optoutprescreen.com.
brokers.source: California CPPA registered data broker (DELETE Act); opt-out URL from public lists

brokers.name: Experian
brokers.notes: Credit bureau plus large marketing-data arm. Prescreen opt-out via optoutprescreen.com. (Old URL 404'd; updated via vanish verify.)
brokers.source: California CPPA registered data broker (DELETE Act); opt-out URL from public lists

brokers.name: Data Axle
brokers.notes: Consumer and business data compiler (formerly Infogroup/InfoUSA). Opt-out via the privacy policy / CCPA section. (Old URL 404'd; updated via vanish verify.)
brokers.source: California CPPA registered data broker (DELETE Act); opt-out URL from public lists

brokers.name: PeekYou

brokers.source: California data-broker registry (CPPA DELETE Act) / public opt-out lists
